provisions.heading_context_raw: Hard Landscaping or Soft Landscaping Requirements Specific Hard Landscaping or Soft Landscaping Requirements in any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, INS, UC-2, or UC-1 zone
provisions.text: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, INS, UC-2, or UC-1 zone, any portion of a front, flanking, side, or rear yard that is not used for driveways, parking, off-street loading spaces, walkways, wheelchair ramps, stairs, or accessory structures shall be landscaped.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Hard Landscaping or Soft Landscaping Requirements Specific Hard Landscaping or Soft Landscaping Requirements in any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, INS, UC-2, or UC-1 zone
provisions.text: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, or COR zone, front or flanking yards along any pedestrian-oriented commercial street, as shown on Schedule 7, shall contain hard landscaping for 100% of the front or flanking yard, by using a minimum of one of the following materials:

sections.title_label_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, any portion of a

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, any portion of a
provisions.text: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, any portion of a front, flanking, side, or rear yard that is not used for driveways, parking, off-street loading spaces, walkways, wheelchair ramps, stairs, or accessory structures shall be hard landscaped or soft landscaped.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, any portion of a
provisions.text: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a minimum of one new tree that is not a shrub, with a minimum base caliper of 50 millimetres, shall be required for any new main building.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, any portion of a
provisions.text: An existing tree that is not a shrub, which meets the minimum base caliper of 50 millimetres, can be counted towards the new tree required in Subsection 421(2). Specific Soft Landscaping Requirements in any CLI, LI, or HRI zone

sections.title_label_raw: In any CLI, LI, or HRI zone, except for a dealership use or where a

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any CLI, LI, or HRI zone, except for a dealership use or where a
provisions.text: In any CLI, LI, or HRI zone, except for a dealership use or where a driveway or walkway access is provided, a 3.0- metre wide strip of soft landscaping shall be required along any front or flanking lot line and shall contain:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any CLI, LI, or HRI zone, except for a dealership use or where a
provisions.text: one shrub no less than 1.0-metre in height for every 2.0 linear metres of length; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any CLI, LI, or HRI zone, except for a dealership use or where a
provisions.text: one tree that is not a shrub, with a minimum base caliper of 50 millimetres, for every 15.0 linear metres of length.
